title: Business Analyst
description:
Position – Business Analyst

Location – Singapore (Onsite)

Salary – DOE

06 months plus contract

Job Description

Position Summary / Project Description:

Provide project coordination support for source system integration activities, as well as lead testing and production verification processes to ensure successful migration project delivery.

Role and Responsibilities

  • Business Analyst for cloud data warehousing, AI & analytics projects
  • Assist project manager in preassessment work and guide junior BA.
  • Responsible for business requirements gathering and systems impact analysis
  • Provide on-going application support (non-prod and prod issues investigation and resolution) and be involved in various stages of the SDLC.
  • Conduct user requirement analysis for the development / implementation of new systems and enhancements to existing systems.
  • Evaluate potential solutions and make recommendations to resolve business problems.
  • Involvement in the system integration testing and user acceptance testing phase prior to implementation.
  • Plan and coordinate end-user training for any system implementations or enhancements.
  • Liaise closely with business users and build good rapport.
  • Liaise closely with vendors in project implementation, application testing, supporting application patches and upgrades in accordance with project methodologies and policies.
  • Support the team in defining project requirements, tracking and documentation.

Requirements / Qualifications

  • Has at least 3 - 4 years’ experience in Data warehousing/AI & Analytics projects.
  • Has implementation involvement in at least 3 - 4 Project cycles
  • Has at least 1 - 2 years’ experience in project management
  • Has at least 3 - 4 years’ experience in gathering and documenting business requirements from end-users
  • Preferably with experience in healthcare industry, with broad understanding of healthcare business processes like patient administration, patient medical and non-medical services.
  • Understanding and hands on experience in all phases of project lifecycle.
  • Strong communication skills and end-user focused.
  • Effective written and verbal communication skills.
  • Team player to ensure team meets delivery targets.
  • Has technical skills and knowledge on Databases – Databricks, AWS RDS; Visualization – Tableau; ETL software – Informatica; Scripting – SQL or Python
  • Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering or equivalent
  • Preferably with experience in Informatica IDMC and\or OBIEE/Tableau.

postedCompany.description:
We are a team of young professionals with an entrepreneurial mindset come together to redefine the talent that accelerate innovation, growth, and sustainability of the business.


We live in a world of complexity and uncertainty, whether its economy or business. And its technology that drives constant change. A business needs the right people, working collaboratively and effectively and that’s where we come in.


Exa- is a new brand that is locally breaded with an international exposure. We bring in a strong persuasion, collaborating with the expertise and network of professionals across IT.


We value and believe in our team, and we start with understanding a candidate’s ambitions. Aspiring ahead with them by - coaching, guiding, investing in their training, and upskilling throughout their career.
